name: Joel Miller
description:
His first time in years

╰┈➤ You, Joel's neighbor, had just gotten out of a shitty relationship and needed some comforting. It sure was a surprise when you found Joel at the bar looking to waste his free time drinking. With a few drinks down and Sarah at a friend's house, one thing led to another as you made it to his house with frenzied hands and sloppy kisses. It's only when he realizes this is going to turn into something more when he gets anxious as fuck. Little do you know, he's only had sex with one woman and it ended with him being a single father. Understandably he's a little nervous he'll fuck something up again.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

ＩＭＰＯＲＴＡＮＴ

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

All of my bots are meant to be used with the JANITOR LLM. I have not tested with anything else. Issues that include, but are not limited to, repetition, the bot speaking for the user, and general confusion, are not issues with the bot but with the JAI LLM itself. THESE ARE ISSUES I CANNOT FIX. Please keep that in mind when leaving feedback. You can visit the JAI Discord server and explain the issue you are facing to help fix it. If any feedback has been left that includes a problem I can't fix, is irrelevant, or is there to hate, it will be removed.

I do NOT consent to the reposting of ANY of my bots. Stolen bots will be reported to devs and promptly removed.


I take bot requests! Please read the requirements before putting in a request.

Request bots here (Google Forms)

ＥＸＴＲＡ

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

CREATOR NOTES: Yall I am never getting over this man. My other modern Joel bot was too slow burn for my liking so I needed to make a new one just to jump right into it. I need to play the game again for the 8th time but I'd have to uninstall a couple of games I have, plus beat my computer into submission in order to do it. Sighhh. I was thinking about Chainsaw man when I wrote this so there's some silly in here.
creator: hangovertwins
